name: Omi Backend
short_desc: Self-hosted AI backend for the Omi wearable AI assistant
author: BasedHardware
description: Omi is an open-source AI wearable that records conversations, extracts memories, and integrates with AI models. This is the self-hosted backend providing the REST API, WebSocket audio transcription pipeline, conversation management, memory extraction, and integrations hub.

form_fields.label: OpenAI API Key
form_fields.hint: Required for GPT-4 and other OpenAI models used for conversation processing and chat.

form_fields.label: Deepgram API Key
form_fields.hint: Required for speech-to-text transcription. Get one at https://deepgram.com

form_fields.label: Encryption Secret
form_fields.hint: 32-byte secret key used for AES-256-GCM encryption of stored data. Use a long random string.

form_fields.label: Firebase Project ID
form_fields.hint: Your Google Firebase project ID (e.g. my-omi-project). Used as the primary database (Firestore).

form_fields.label: Firebase API Key
form_fields.hint: Firebase web API key from your Firebase project settings.

form_fields.label: Google Service Account JSON (base64)
form_fields.hint: Base64-encoded Google Cloud service account JSON with Firestore and GCS access. Run: base64 service-account.json

form_fields.label: Google Cloud Project ID
form_fields.hint: GCP project ID for Google Cloud Storage buckets. Usually the same as your Firebase project ID.

form_fields.label: Admin Key
form_fields.hint: Secret token for admin API access. Use a long random string.

form_fields.label: Anthropic API Key
form_fields.hint: Optional. Enables Claude models for conversation processing.

form_fields.label: Groq API Key
form_fields.hint: Optional. Enables fast inference via Groq.

form_fields.label: Pinecone API Key
form_fields.hint: Optional. Enables vector semantic search for memories.

form_fields.label: Pinecone Index Name
form_fields.hint: Optional. Pinecone index name for memory embeddings.
